title: pilosella × bifurca subsp. vindobonensis
intro: Pilosella × bifurca subsp. vindobonensis is a rare, hybrid plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), which is a cross between Pilosella bifurca and Pilosella officinarum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. Pilosella × bifurca subsp. vindobonensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
